name: Multi Actor Consensus Mechanic
summary: Designs an anti-fraud trust signal from N independent actors. Bakes in: distinct actors (by id), distinct organizations (by business_tax_id or equivalent),…
description: Designs an anti-fraud trust signal from N independent actors. Bakes in: distinct actors (by id), distinct organizations (by business_tax_id or equivalent), cooldown between attempts, rolling time window, cohesion gate (median +/- band). Generalizes Sound Score; applies to any signal you want to make hard to fake.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver multi actor consensus mechanic output correctly and completely.
